project: Technical Paper - HSR Social CBA Sensitivity Analyser v4.0

1_read_source.notes: Full 2202-line hsr_cba_app_upg2.py read via subagent. Complete structured summary obtained.

2_research_citations.notes: Citations from code CITATIONS dict + supplementary DOI searches completed. | VERIFICATION DONE: Flyvbjerg cost=44.7% MATCH; demand=48.7% MISMATCH (should be 51.4%/0.514) - corrected in paper; UK VOT leisure €14 too high vs £6.60/hr≈€7.6 - documented with explanation; discount rates, CO2 prices verified OK.

3_write_paper.notes: Full draft written to technical_paper.md (~34KB). All sections covered.

gathered_data.source_summary: Streamlit-based social CBA tool for HSR projects. Strictly incremental vs counterfactual. Features: NPV/BCR/IRR/payback, RCF (Flyvbjerg), spend profiles, tornado sensitivity, Monte Carlo, threshold/break-even analysis, corridor comparison, audit trail. 15 corridor presets, 10 country profiles. 6 toggleable benefit components. Companion to Nash et al. 2026 paper.
